  • Method Details

    • accountId

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder accountId(String accountId)
      The account id used in calculating order costs

    • accountId

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder accountId(Optional<String> accountId)
      The account id used in calculating order costs

    • askMinimumQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder askMinimumQuantity(AskMinimumQuantity askMinimumQuantity)
      The best ask minimum quantity. This will be absent if no ask information is available

    • askMinimumQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder askMinimumQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AskMinimumQuantity> askMinimumQuantity)
      The best ask minimum quantity. This will be absent if no ask information is available

    • askPrices

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder askPrices(List<BidAskPrice> askPrices)
      The price information of the best ask matching the request criteria. If no ask information is available at all, this will be empty. If yield information is not available, then this will only contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR-typed price.

    • askPrices

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder askPrices(Optional<? extends List<BidAskPrice>> askPrices)
      The price information of the best ask matching the request criteria. If no ask information is available at all, this will be empty. If yield information is not available, then this will only contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR-typed price.

    • askQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder askQuantity(AskQuantity askQuantity)
      The best ask quantity. This will be absent if no ask information is available

    • askQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder askQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AskQuantity> askQuantity)
      The best ask quantity. This will be absent if no ask information is available

    • assetId

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder assetId(String assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder assetId(Optional<String> assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

      The type of asset referenced by the security identifier

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder bidMinimumQuantity(BidMinimumQuantity bidMinimumQuantity)
      The best bid minimum quantity. This will be absent if no bid information is available

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder bidMinimumQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BidMinimumQuantity> bidMinimumQuantity)
      The best bid minimum quantity. This will be absent if no bid information is available

    • bidPrices

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder bidPrices(List<BidAskPrice> bidPrices)
      The price information of the best bid matching the request criteria. If no bid information is available at all, this will be empty. If yield information is not available, then this will only contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR-typed price.

    • bidPrices

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder bidPrices(Optional<? extends List<BidAskPrice>> bidPrices)
      The price information of the best bid matching the request criteria. If no bid information is available at all, this will be empty. If yield information is not available, then this will only contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR-typed price.

    • bidQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder bidQuantity(BidQuantity bidQuantity)
      The best bid quantity. This will be absent if no bid information is available

    • bidQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder bidQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BidQuantity> bidQuantity)
      The best bid quantity. This will be absent if no bid information is available

    • brokerCapacity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder brokerCapacity(RetrieveQuoteResponseBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity)
      Capacity used in determining bid and ask prices. Defaults to "AGENCY" if no value specified.

    • brokerCapacity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder brokerCapacity(Optional<? extends RetrieveQuoteResponseBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity)
      Capacity used in determining bid and ask prices. Defaults to "AGENCY" if no value specified.

    • identifier

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifier

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder identifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder identifierType(RetrieveQuoteResponseIdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset for which the best bid and offer is returned. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • identifierType

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder identifierType(Optional<? extends RetrieveQuoteResponseIdentifierType> identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset for which the best bid and offer is returned. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • minimumQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder minimumQuantity(MinimumQuantity minimumQuantity)
      The minimum quantity specified in the request (if any). For Fixed Income: Expressed in the par (face-value) amount and may not exceed two decimal places for USD-based currencies.

    • minimumQuantity

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder minimumQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends MinimumQuantity> minimumQuantity)
      The minimum quantity specified in the request (if any). For Fixed Income: Expressed in the par (face-value) amount and may not exceed two decimal places for USD-based currencies.

    • responseGenerationTime

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder responseGenerationTime(OffsetDateTime responseGenerationTime)
      The time the response was generated by the system

      public RetrieveQuoteResponse.Builder responseGenerationTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> responseGenerationTime)
      The time the response was generated by the system
